visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white bucket hat, a white long-sleeved sweater, and distressed jeans with large knee cutouts, stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle. She holds a shell-shaped mint green plate and a larger blue-and-white striped plate. Behind her are high orange warehouse shelves filled with brown boxes and some product displays. (2) The camera zooms in on a price tag and product information card attached to the shelf. It displays numbers like 999 and 1,339 in black and red text. The lighting is uniform and bright. (3) The woman holds up various items from the set for individual inspection: a large striped plate, a shell-shaped mint green dish, a mug with blue stripes and a bright coral handle, and a white bowl. She gestures toward the anchor icon inside the bowl. (4) The woman puts the displayed items back onto the shelving unit. She then bends down to pick up a large, heavy-looking square box containing the complete dinnerware set, struggling slightly with the weight before holding it up and smiling broadly at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: 大家搶著買 黑五價格扯爆 63元餐具好誇張. (2) [Slogan]: BLACK FRIDAY 黑色購物週 | 賣場限時優惠 售完為止. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個63塊 這個63塊 你敢信. (4) [Slogan]: 1533643 DINNERWARE 16PC SET 陶瓷餐具&馬克杯 16件組四人份. (5) [Subtitle]: 這組 $999. (6) [Subtitle]: 一家四口 都是夏日海洋風. (7) [Subtitle]: 拿的時候要小心 因為很重. (8) [Subtitle]: 超划算 超划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 1 male and 2 females visible as distant shoppers in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman wearing a white fuzzy bucket hat with an 'NY' logo, a white mock-neck long-sleeve sweater, and blue denim jeans with very large cutouts at the knees. She carries a brown designer-style shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style retail environment (Costco) characterized by tall orange industrial shelving, stacked cardboard boxes, and fluorescent ceiling lights. The floor is grey concrete.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins with a bright, high-pitched tone over an upbeat synth-pop track featuring a clear, moderate-tempo drum beat. (2) A 'Whoosh' transition sound effect triggers as the speaker's vocal pitch increases while discussing prices. (3) Percussive clinking sounds of ceramic objects are heard as they are manipulated. A second, off-camera female voice provides brief, high-pitched vocal reactions like 'Oh!' and 'Wow!' (4) Low-frequency shuffling and a dull thud occur as a heavy cardboard container is moved. The narration concludes with a high-arousal summary while the music remains consistent until a short fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence Presentation -> Functional Showcase -> Emotional Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional consumer recommendation for a Costco Black Friday sale. The creator uses high-energy audio and rapid visual shifts to highlight the extreme value of a 16-piece dinnerware set, calculating a low price-per-unit to persuade viewers to visit the store and purchase the item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content appears to be a personal shopping vlog typical of social media creators sharing retail finds, without explicit sponsored indicators.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-arousal social media edit optimized for engagement through vibrant visuals, clear subtitles, and rhythmic sound design.
